overview: safeT PTT is a private, multi-tenant push-to-talk platform built for public safety agencies. Voice, location, recordings, and admin actions are scoped to your agency — never mixed with other customers.

pillars.title: Encrypted voice relay
pillars.summary: Every transmission travels over TLS (HTTPS/WSS) to an authenticated relay. Handsets bind to your agency with a per-tenant radio key; console and admin users authenticate with individual accounts.
details: Voice WebSocket connections require a valid agency radio key or user JWT.
Transport encryption uses industry-standard TLS on all client ↔ server paths.
Agency radio keys can be rotated from safeT Control without rebuilding channels.

pillars.title: Multi-tenant isolation
pillars.summary: Channels, users, recordings, alerts, billing, and audit events belong to one agency. API handlers enforce agency scope on every read and write.
details: No cross-tenant channel or user visibility through the REST or voice APIs.
Platform owner accounts manage agencies but do not share radio tenants.
Legacy single-tenant data migrates into a dedicated Default Agency on first boot.

pillars.title: Session control
pillars.summary: Newest sign-in wins — if a handset is lost or stolen, signing in elsewhere immediately retires the old session so it cannot keep listening or transmitting.
details: Single active handset session per radio account.
Dispatch and admin sessions use JWT with server-side validation.
Lost-device mitigation does not require wiping the physical device first.

pillars.title: Data retention & logs
pillars.summary: All plans include 3 days of transmission logs with auto-transcription. Agencies can add unlimited retention for investigations, QA, and after-action review.
details: Retention sweeps run automatically per agency based on subscription settings.
Unlimited logs add-on: $20/agency/month — indefinite transmission archive.
Export and search from safeT Command; replay from handsets for recent traffic.

pillars.title: Audit & administration
pillars.summary: Agency administrators provision users, channels, permissions, and integrations from safeT Control. Administrative actions are logged for accountability.
details: Per-channel permission templates for radio and dispatcher roles.
Billing and subscription changes via Stripe Customer Portal.
Security questionnaires: contact us for our current security packet.

pillars.title: Payments
pillars.summary: Card data is handled entirely by Stripe. safeT servers never store payment card numbers.
details: PCI scope reduced — billing card entry occurs on Stripe-hosted flows.
Agency billing status gates service during trial expiry or failed payment.
Purchase orders and customized billing: contact sales for enterprise terms.

compliance.title: Compliance & certifications
compliance.intro: We are building toward formal third-party attestations common in public safety procurement. Today we provide transparent architecture documentation and a security packet on request.

items.name: SOC 2 Type II
items.note: Not yet certified. Request our security packet for current controls documentation.

items.name: CJIS alignment
items.note: Law enforcement agencies should review our security packet against their CJIS Security Policy requirements. We do not claim CJIS certification today.

items.name: HIPAA
items.note: Hospital and healthcare security teams should evaluate PHI exposure in voice logs and retention. Business Associate Agreements available on request for qualified deployments.

items.name: GDPR
items.note: Agency-scoped data with defined retention windows. Data processing terms available in our Privacy Policy.

operations.title: Reliability & operations
operations.intro: Production runs on managed cloud infrastructure with health monitoring. We design for dispatch continuity — not consumer walkie-talkie uptime claims without measurement.

items.label: Health monitoring
items.body: Public /health endpoint for API availability checks and automated platform monitoring.

items.label: Voice path
items.body: Dedicated WebSocket voice relay outside Express compression for low-latency half-duplex audio.

items.label: LMR supplement
items.body: safeT supplements — it does not replace — mission-critical Land Mobile Radio. Maintain conventional radio backup for life-safety operations.

items.label: Incident communication
items.body: Subscribe to product updates at /updates. Dedicated status page available on request for enterprise customers.

reliabilityStats.label: Encrypted transport on all client connections
Active handset session — newest sign-in wins
